data.biography: Pin Danita Choktadaporn is a singer, actress and member of the girl group Cosmos and the sub-unit Comsos Sun under Star Hunter Entertainment (สตาร์ ฮันเตอร์ เอ็นเตอร์เทนเม้นท์). After graduating from Nawaminthrachinuthit School, she went on to study at Chulalongkorn University's Faculty of Veterinary Science.
data.name: Danita Choktadaporn
